_comment: Per-pattern raw (uncompressed) JS chunk limits. Patterns are matched against relative paths under .next/static/chunks. Limits are applied from most-specific to most-generic; the first matching pattern wins. To recalibrate, run `pnpm --filter @hamafx/web build` and inspect .next/static/chunks, then adjust `maxBytes` so limits sit ~10% above the largest observed chunk.

limits.description: Fallback for any other JS chunk (≈849 KB, calibrated 10% above largest shared chunk)
